name: 小小无常 Little Wu Chang
short_description: "Little Wu Chang" is a 2D top-down soul-like APRG game based on Chinese mythology. You will play as a newly born Little Wu Chang and experience a journey through mythology that is both familiar and unfamiliar.
detailed_description:
A Souls-like game set against the backdrop of the Journey to the West story?

...However, the protagonist is not Sun Wukong, but a little WuChang.

Game introduction

Explore unknown territories and unveil the veil of mystery.

As a newly born ghost, your first mission assigned by the King of Hell is to urgently go to the mortal world to save the underworld that is in peril. What exactly happened? During this journey, you will embark on adventures in multiple maps, each with its own unique features. Along the way, you will encounter all kinds of gods, demons, and helpless mortals, each with their own personalities and abilities. While dealing with them, you will strive to uncover the truth behind everything.

Use all your tricks to overcome powerful enemies.

Do you prefer cold weapons or fancy spells, or do you limit yourself and go barehanded to challenge your enemies? In this adventure, you will face many opponents. Let loose your hands and mind, and utilize everything around you to defeat them.

Wear different jade pendants to deal with various challenges.

When you help someone or pass by a hidden treasure spot, you may get all sorts of jade pendants. Don't forget about them because these small jade pendants can provide indispensable performance for your character, making the entire gaming experience more comfortable and enjoyable.

Game Strategy

As a Souls-like game, completing it and collecting everything is not an easy task. Moreover, due to a limited number of developers, there may be areas that have not been adequately tested. Therefore, we have also provided a complete PDF guide with images and text in the community to facilitate everyone's challenge.
